name: agency-agents-codex-plugin
description: Local Codex plugin that converts agency-agents specialists into Codex skills.

interface.shortDescription: Converted local skill pack from agency-agents
interface.longDescription: Provides 163 converted specialist skills generated from the local agency-agents repository.
defaultPrompt: Use the backend architect skill to design a service.
Use the SEO specialist skill to review site visibility.
Use the project shepherd skill to coordinate a launch.
